blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Auth middleware (eb9dfb0) broke profile creation - POST /api/profile returns 401 Unauthorized because /api/profile is not a public path. Onboarding cannot complete.
Same auth middleware issue - cannot access meditation session because onboarding flow is broken

notes: Auth middleware was added after the prior validation run (eb9dfb0 after c3f0a04). The middleware protects all /api/* routes but did not add POST /api/profile to public paths. This broke the frontend's ability to create profiles during onboarding. The frontend calls POST /api/profile directly without auth tokens, but the auth middleware now blocks this request. Profile creation via curl with auth token works (verified manually). STT assertions (VAL-STT-001 to VAL-STT-008, VAL-CROSS-002, VAL-CROSS-003) remain untested because STT features are still pending implementation.
